CustomField.formula:
IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(JungleGym_Sync_Status__c, "Failed"), JungleGym_Sync_Error_Resolved__c = false), IMAGE("/sfc/servlet.shepherd/version/renditionDownload?rendition=ORIGINAL_Png&versionId=068Em000007Gnbp&operationContext=CHATTER&contentId=05TEm00000AwmUp", "Sync Failed", 50, 50),
IF(OR(ISPICKVAL(JungleGym_Sync_Status__c, "Success"), AND(ISPICKVAL(JungleGym_Sync_Status__c, "Failed") , JungleGym_Sync_Error_Resolved__c = true)), IMAGE("/sfc/servlet.shepherd/version/renditionDownload?rendition=ORIGINAL_Png&versionId=068Em000007GpfF&operationContext=CHATTER&contentId=05TEm00000Awjbj", "Sync Successful", 50, 50), null))
CustomField.label: JungleGym Sync Image
